---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: now
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"
params:
  title:      "BOEM Marine Sensitivity Report"
  areas_json: "[]"
  ver:        "v6"
  format:     "html"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    lof: true
    lot: true
  docx:
    reference-doc: "../workflows/libs/ESP Report Template 2025_1 tech.docx"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    lof: true
    lot: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(msens)
  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(terra)
  library(purrr)
  library(jsonlite)
  library(yaml)
  library(knitr)
})

is_html <- params$format == "html"

areas <- jsonlite::fromJSON(params$areas_json, simplifyVector = FALSE)
if (length(areas) == 0) {
  stop("No areas provided. Pass `areas_json` as a JSON array of ",
       '[{"label":..,"kind":"wkt"|"pra","value":..}].')
}

area_to_sf <- function(a) {
  if (a$kind == "pra") {
    msens::ply_planareas |>
      dplyr::filter(planarea_key == a$value) |>
      sf::st_geometry() |>
      sf::st_as_sf()
  } else {
    sf::st_as_sfc(a$value, crs = 4326) |>
      sf::st_as_sf()
  }
}

areas_sf  <- purrr::map(areas, area_to_sf)
areas_lbl <- purrr::map_chr(areas, "label")

con       <- msens::sdm_db_con(version = params$ver, read_only = TRUE)
r_cell_id <- msens::cell_id_raster()[["cell_id"]]

areas_data <- purrr::pmap(list(areas_sf, areas_lbl), function(ply, lbl) {
  cells <- msens::cells_in_polygon(ply, r_cell_id)
  list(
    label  = lbl,
    ply    = ply,
    cells  = cells,
    scores = msens::scores_for_cells(con, cells),
    spp    = msens::species_for_cells(con, cells))
})

# combined sf used by the Map section
all_areas <- do.call(
  rbind,
  purrr::imap(areas_sf, ~ dplyr::mutate(.x, label = areas_lbl[[.y]])))
```

## Parameters

```{r}
#| label: print-params
cat(yaml::as.yaml(list(
  title  = params$title,
  ver    = params$ver,
  format = params$format,
  n_areas = length(areas),
  areas  = purrr::map(areas_data, ~ list(
    label      = .x$label,
    kind       = areas[[which(areas_lbl == .x$label)[1]]]$kind,
    n_cells    = nrow(.x$cells),
    mean_score = round(msens::mean_score(.x$scores), 1)))
)))
```

## Map

```{r}
#| label: map-html
#| eval: !expr is_html
# mapgl::maplibre() is used instead of mapboxgl(), which does not
# render inside Quarto documents (walkerke/mapgl#3).
mapgl::maplibre(
  bounds = sf::st_bbox(all_areas)
) |>
  mapgl::add_fill_layer(
    id           = "areas",
    source       = all_areas,
    fill_color   = "#3388ff",
    fill_opacity = 0.4,
    tooltip      = "label")
```

```{r}
#| label: map-static
#| eval: !expr '!is_html'
#| fig-cap: "Areas of interest."
msens::ggmap_areas(all_areas)
```

```{r}
#| label: scores-header
#| output: asis
cat("## Plot of Scores\n\n")
if (is_html) cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
res <- purrr::map_chr(areas_data, function(ad) {
  knitr::knit_child(
    "report_area_child.qmd",
    envir  = rlang::env(ad = ad, section = "scores", is_html = is_html),
    quiet  = TRUE)
})
cat(res, sep = "\n")
if (is_html) cat("\n:::\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: species-header
#| output: asis
cat("\n## Table of Species\n\n")
if (is_html) cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")
res <- purrr::map_chr(areas_data, function(ad) {
  knitr::knit_child(
    "report_area_child.qmd",
    envir  = rlang::env(ad = ad, section = "species", is_html = is_html),
    quiet  = TRUE)
})
cat(res, sep = "\n")
if (is_html) cat("\n:::\n")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
DBI::dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```
